allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "z-star-coming-soon.html"; $manifestText = $lines[167]; $obj = $manifestText | ConvertFrom-Json; $keys = $obj.PSObject.Properties.Name; "Total entries: $\($keys.Count\)"; "First UUID: $\($keys[0]\)"; $first = $obj.\($keys[0]\); "MIME: $\($first.mime\)"; "Compressed: $\($first.compressed\)"; "Data length: $\($first.data.Length\)"; "Property names: $\($first.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)")
PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force css, js, images, fonts, index.html -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\\_extract.ps1")

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force css, js, images, fonts, index.html -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\\_extract.ps1" | Out-Null; Write-Output '--- styles.css url\(\) lines ---'; Select-String -Path 'css\\styles.css' -Pattern 'url\\\(' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })
